title: add optional CI test fo darwin
body:
run gofmt and make for darwin to prevent regressions from new code for a potential
darwin build.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: :boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 1st testsuite: only one of 'host', 'container', or 'cluster' required.
ok this is ready for review

Well I still think it should be required, but maybe we wait until we get buildah 1.2 out.
